title: StackOps User Config Schema
description: Schema for the StackOps user configuration file at ~/dotfiles/stackops/config/config.json.

$schema.description: Optional link to the JSON Schema used for this file.

GeneralConfig.description: Shared StackOps defaults used by CLI helpers.

repos.description: Repository roots managed by devops update and status commands.

scripts.description: Additional script roots searched by script launch helpers.

prompts.description: Additional prompt roots searched by prompt helpers.

email_config_name.description: Default email profile name used for notifications.

to_email.description: Default recipient address used for notifications.
